title: Platform spec: api.json library tree documentation

source.subject: docs(spec): api.json library tree; bump compiler and pckg for API reference UI

body:
## Outcome

Api.json library tree; bump compiler and pckg for API reference UI.

## Context

- Workstream **docs-site** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Structured **api.json** is the hierarchical contract for package docs (types, members, **typeRef** links)—not parallel string-key tables outside the schema.
- Normative updates live under `site/website/src/content/docs/platform-spec/` and ship via beskid-lang.org.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`af673dc`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/af673dc) — docs(spec): api.json library tree; bump compiler and pckg for API reference UI
